heading: Definitions
label: 31b Definitions
notes: References in TextSections 31a to 31h of this title, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , known as the National Geologic Mapping Act of 1992, which is classified principally to sections 31a to 31h of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 102–285section 31a of this title

children.heading: Advisory committee
children.label: 1 Advisory committee
children.text: The term “advisory committee” means the advisory committee established under .section 31d of this title

children.heading: Association
children.label: 2 Association
children.text: The term “Association” means the Association of American State Geologists.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 3 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the United States Geological Survey.

children.heading: Education component
children.label: 4 Education component
children.text: The term “education component” means the education component of the geologic mapping program described in .section 31c(d)(3) of this title

children.heading: Federal component
children.label: 5 Federal component
children.text: The term “Federal component” means the Federal component of the geologic mapping program described in .section 31c(d)(1) of this title

children.heading: Geologic mapping program
children.label: 6 Geologic mapping program
children.text: The term “geologic mapping program” means the National Cooperative Geologic Mapping Program established by .section 31c(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 7 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.heading: State
children.label: 8 State
children.text: The term “State” includes the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, American Samoa, Guam, and the Virgin Islands.

children.heading: State component
children.label: 9 State component
children.text: The term “State component” means the State component of the geologic mapping program described in .section 31c(d)(2) of this title

children.heading: Survey
children.label: 10 Survey
children.text: The term “Survey” means the United States Geological Survey.
